title: Nileshwar Muthappan Madappura
tagline: Nileshwar Muthappan Madappura — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Nileshwar Muthappan Madappura is a temple of the Hindu god Muthappan in the town of Nileshwar of Kasaragode district, Kerala state, South India.
overview.description: Nileshwar Muthappan Madappura is a temple of the Hindu god Muthappan in the town of Nileshwar of Kasaragode district, Kerala state, South India.

topPlaces.name: Nileshwaram
topPlaces.description: Nileshwaram or Nileshwar or Neeleeswaram is a municipality and a major town in Kasaragod District, state of Kerala, India. It is one of the three municipalities in Kasaragod district; the others are Kasaragod and Kanhangad.

topPlaces.name: Kottappuram, Kasaragod
topPlaces.description: Kottappuram or Kasargod district, north Kerala, India, is a backwater destination, which is also known as "Valiyaparamba backwaters". Kottappuram is situated 40 km south of Kasaragod, a part of Nileshwar municipality.

topPlaces.name: Pattena
topPlaces.description: Pattena is part of Nileshwar municipality in Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Udinoor
topPlaces.description: Udinoor is a village in Kasaragod district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Perole
topPlaces.description: Perole is a census town and part of the Nileshwaram Municipality in Hosdurg taluk of Kasaragod district, Kerala, India. It is located 1.5 km east of Nileshwaram town.

topPlaces.name: Aingoth
topPlaces.description: Aingoth is a settlement in Kerala, India. It is located on the NH17 between Nileshwar and Kanhangad towns on the Cochin-Mangalore National Highway in Kasaragod District, Kanhangad Municipality.

topPlaces.name: Cheruvathur
topPlaces.description: Cheruvathur is a town and grama panchayat in the Kasaragod district, state of Kerala. It is located 41 km (25 mi) from the district headquarters Kasaragod.

topPlaces.name: Thimiri (Kasaragod)
topPlaces.description: Thimiri is a village in Hosdurg taluk of Kasaragod district in Kerala state, India. Thimiri is located 3 km east of Cheruvathur on Cheruvathur-Cheemeni road.

items.note: Nileshwaram or Nileshwar or Neeleeswaram is a municipality and a major town in Kasaragod District, state of Kerala, India. It is one of the three municipalities in Kasaragod district; the others are Kasaragod and Kanhangad.

Kottappuram or Kasargod district, north Kerala, India, is a backwater destination, which is also known as "Valiyaparamba backwaters". Kottappuram is situated 40 km south of Kasaragod, a part of Nileshwar municipality.
Pattena is part of Nileshwar municipality in Kerala, India.
Udinoor is a village in Kasaragod district in the state of Kerala, India.
Perole is a census town and part of the Nileshwaram Municipality in Hosdurg taluk of Kasaragod district, Kerala, India. It is located 1.5 km east of Nileshwaram town.
Aingoth is a settlement in Kerala, India. It is located on the NH17 between Nileshwar and Kanhangad towns on the Cochin-Mangalore National Highway in Kasaragod District, Kanhangad Municipality.
Cheruvathur is a town and grama panchayat in the Kasaragod district, state of Kerala. It is located 41 km (25 mi) from the district headquarters Kasaragod.
Thimiri is a village in Hosdurg taluk of Kasaragod district in Kerala state, India. Thimiri is located 3 km east of Cheruvathur on Cheruvathur-Cheemeni road.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Nileshwar Muthappan Madappura?
faq.a: The best time to visit Nileshwar Muthappan Madappura is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Nileshwar Muthappan Madappura?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mangaluru International Airport (83 km) and the nearest railway station is Mangaluru Central (75 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Nileshwar Muthappan Madappura?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Nileshwar Muthappan Madappura at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Nileshwar Muthappan Madappura?
faq.a: Stays in Nileshwar Muthappan Madappura start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Nileshwar Muthappan Madappura?
faq.a: The top attractions are Nileshwaram, Kottappuram, Kasaragod, Pattena, Udinoor, Perole.
